name: Murattal
description: Standard recitation at a moderate, measured pace following tajweed rules

name: Mujawwad
description: Melodic recitation with elaborate vocal ornamentation and extended maqam patterns

name: Muallim
description: Teaching recitation with pauses for student repetition

name: Children Repeat
description: Each verse repeated multiple times at a pace suited for children's memorisation (hifz)

name: Taraweeh
description: Live recordings from Taraweeh night prayers during Ramadan
